name: myjarvis
description: MyJarvis — Assistente de IA inspirado no JARVIS do Homem de Ferro

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && npm run dev:services
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev -w service-gateway" "npm run dev -w service-auth" "npm run dev -w service-ai" "npm run dev -w jarvis-web"
